src.parsers.cells package

Submodules

src.parsers.cells.tif module

tif.py

Defines the Tif, which reads a labeled TIFF segmentation mask and parses it into a dictionary of Cell objects.

class src.parsers.cells.tif.Tif[source]

Bases: Parser[dict[int, Cell]]

Parse cell objects from a labeled TIFF mask.

Reads a labeled segmentation mask from a TIFF file, where each distinct label value corosponds to a single cell region, and builds a Cell object for each one.

parse(filepath)[source]

Generate cell objects from a labeled mask file.

Reads a labeled TIFF mask at filepath and builds a Cell object for each distinct label found in the mask, keyed by its cell ID.

Parameters:

filepath (str) – The path to the TIFF file to parse.

Returns:

A dictionary mapping each cell ID to its corresponding Cell object.

Return type:

dict[int, Cell]

Module contents

class src.parsers.cells.Tif[source]

Bases: Parser[dict[int, Cell]]

Parse cell objects from a labeled TIFF mask.

Reads a labeled segmentation mask from a TIFF file, where each distinct label value corosponds to a single cell region, and builds a Cell object for each one.

parse(filepath)[source]

Generate cell objects from a labeled mask file.

Reads a labeled TIFF mask at filepath and builds a Cell object for each distinct label found in the mask, keyed by its cell ID.

Parameters:

filepath (str) – The path to the TIFF file to parse.

Returns:

A dictionary mapping each cell ID to its corresponding Cell object.

Return type:

dict[int, Cell]
